title: Membership & Registration: admin review and user profiles
body: Add admin review/approval workflow and extended user profiles (bio, typing speed, year, mentor flag).

title: Social OAuth: GitHub/Google login
body: Add social OAuth login/registration via providers (GitHub, Google).

title: Promotion/CMS pages and notifications
body: Add promotional templates, application email notifications, and optional Telegram integration for alerts.

title: Events & Workshops: rich model and admin flags
body: Implement events/workshops with trainer bio, level, prerequisites, travel/accommodation/expense, lab requirements, and approval/publish flags.

title: Project pages and mentor relationships
body: Add project listing/detail pages, mentor/mentee links, and image uploads for projects.

title: Achievements module
body: Add achievements module: articles, internships, talks, contests, and GSoC timelines.

title: Documents management
body: Implement document uploads, catalog, and per-user access/update forms.

title: Technical resources library
body: Add categorized resources with external links and file uploads per category.

title: Attendance logging & reporting
body: Add attendance logging, client integration, and attendance percentage reports/admin views.

title: Status updates & mailing list integration
body: Add weekly status update system and mailing list configuration/sending.

title: User-submitted content & moderation
body: Add review/feedback forms and moderation workflows for user-submitted content.

title: Admin UI & permissions
body: Implement admin-driven content creation, verification, and a permission model.

title: REST API & Authentication
body: Add authenticated API endpoints (JWT) for status, attendance, documents, and user management.

title: Rich form UX & editors
body: Integrate TinyMCE or an alternative rich-text editor, datepickers, and enhanced form widgets.

title: Persistent DB & media handling
body: Migrate in-memory data to a persistent DB (Postgres/MySQL) and add media/static handling.

title: Install & ops docs
body: Add extended install and deployment docs (DB setup, migrations, production configs).

title: Timeline / historical UI components
body: Add timeline and historical UI components for club history and achievements.
